name: Bali
description: Tropical island paradise with rice terraces, surf beaches, and spiritual temples.

name: Paris
description: The city of lights, renowned for art, fashion, and world-class cuisine.

name: Tokyo
description: A dazzling megacity where ultra-modern technology meets ancient tradition.

name: New York
description: The city that never sleeps, packed with iconic landmarks, culture, and nightlife.

name: Bangkok
description: A chaotic, electrifying city of golden temples, street food, and vibrant nightlife.

name: Barcelona
description: A sun-drenched city famous for Gaudí architecture, tapas, and beachside clubs.

name: Cape Town
description: A spectacular city at the tip of Africa with mountains, vineyards, and diverse wildlife.

name: Iceland
description: Land of fire and ice offering dramatic landscapes, geysers, and the Northern Lights.

name: Santorini
description: A stunning Aegean island with whitewashed cliffs, iconic blue domes, and breathtaking sunsets.

name: Patagonia
description: Wild, windswept wilderness at the southern tip of the Americas with glaciers and jagged peaks.

name: Prague
description: A fairytale city of Gothic spires, cobblestone lanes, and legendary beer culture.

name: Maldives
description: Overwater bungalows, crystal-clear lagoons, and pristine coral reefs in the Indian Ocean.

name: Marrakech
description: A sensory feast of spice-filled souks, ornate palaces, and bustling Djemaa el-Fna square.

name: Kyoto
description: Japan's ancient imperial capital, draped in cherry blossoms and Zen temple gardens.

name: Lisbon
description: A sun-washed hillside capital with trams, fado music, and a thriving food scene.

name: Buenos Aires
description: The Paris of South America, alive with tango, steak, and a passionate café culture.

name: Queenstown
description: The adventure capital of the world, offering bungee jumping, skiing, and jaw-dropping fjords.

name: Safari Kenya
description: Witness the Great Migration and Big Five across vast savannah plains of the Masai Mara.

name: Amalfi Coast
description: Dramatic clifftop villages, azure coves, and sun-drenched lemons along Italy's most scenic coastline.

name: Montreal
description: A bilingual city known for its world-class food festivals, jazz scene, and vibrant arts quarter.

name: Chiang Mai
description: A laid-back northern Thai city surrounded by misty jungle, elephant sanctuaries, and night markets.

name: Dubrovnik
description: A medieval walled city on the Adriatic Sea, famous for its limestone streets and Game of Thrones scenery.

name: Machu Picchu
description: The legendary Inca citadel perched high in the Andes Mountains, shrouded in mist and mystery.

name: Amsterdam
description: A city of canals, cycling culture, world-class museums, and a famously liberal nightlife.

name: Dubai
description: A dazzling desert metropolis of record-breaking skyscrapers, luxury malls, and desert safaris.

name: Lima
description: South America's culinary capital, blending pre-Columbian history with a thriving modern food scene.

name: Vienna
description: An imperial city of grand palaces, concert halls, and the world's finest coffee house culture.

name: Copenhagen
description: A stylish Nordic capital celebrated for hygge, design, Michelin-starred dining, and cycling paths.

name: Zanzibar
description: A spice-scented island off the East African coast with pristine beaches and rich Swahili culture.

name: Seoul
description: A hyper-connected megacity where K-pop culture, street food, and ancient palaces coexist seamlessly.
